data.title: The JIAN Group Represents Harris Door & Millwork LLC in a Transaction with Trimlite, a platform company of Wynnchurch Capital
data.description: The JIAN Group has successfully overseen the acquisition of Harris Door & Millwork by Trimlite, a subsidiary of Wynnchurch Capital. Harris Door & Millwork, a prominent distributor of door products in the Southeast, caters to a diverse clientele including national pro dealers and local independents. Scotty Harris Jr. and Devon Miller will continue to lead the company as VP and General Manager, and VP respectively. This transaction marks a significant development in the industry and underlines the strong leadership and customer-oriented approach of Harris Door & Millwork.
U.S. TREASURY SECRETARY BESSENT STATED THE FED IS A LONG WAY FROM RETURNING TO QUANTITATIVE EASING. HE ALSO PROJECTED A LOWER OIL PRICE REGIME OVER THE MEDIUM TERM ONCE THE CONFLICT ENDS.

data.title: Company sees positive response as investors exercise 500K warrants, boosting funds for future growth.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 5.2%, marking a significant rise from the previous quarter. The number of jobless individuals has also seen a surge, reaching 1.3 million people. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in job vacancies by 7% compared to the same period last year. Experts attribute this economic downturn to various factors, including global market instability and internal issues such as inflation. Efforts are being made to address this concerning situation and bring about positive changes in the job market.

data.title: Upwind Partners with Microsoft to Deliver Runtime Security for Azure Workloads
data.description: Upwind, renowned for its focus on runtime cloud security, has joined forces with Microsoft to introduce a comprehensive Azure security solution to global enterprises. This collaboration combines runtime protection, posture management, and vulnerability detection into one seamless platform, enabling organizations to maintain constant and consolidated oversight of their Azure environments. The integrated solution can be accessed on the Microsoft Marketplace, providing users with extensive compatibility with Azure's specifications.

data.title: Wesley So Wins Open; Alice Lee Secures Third Consecutive Women's Title at 2026 American Cup
data.description: In Saint Louis, the 2026 American Cup hosted by the Saint Louis Chess Club (STLCC) recently ended with notable achievements by two prominent American chess players. Grandmaster (GM) Wesley So emerged victorious in the Open category, demonstrating an impressive performance. International Master (IM) Alice Lee secured the Women’s Championship title for an exceptional third consecutive year. Lee's extraordinary feat at the age of 16 showcases her rapid ascent among the top young players globally, while So's victory signifies his initial win in this prestigious event.
NORTH KOREA HAS ACCUSED JAPAN OF PUSHING THE REGION INTO DANGER THROUGH ITS LONG-RANGE MISSILE DEPLOYMENTS, ACCORDING TO KCNA.

data.title: Kodak Stock Soars After Q4 Earnings
data.description: Eastman Kodak Co's (NYSE: KODK) stock is experiencing a significant surge in after-hours trading following the release of their fourth-quarter results. The company reported a 9% year-over-year increase in revenue for Q4, totaling $290 million. Revenue from Advanced Materials and Chemicals saw a substantial growth of 25% to $85 million, while Print revenues reached $195 million, a 4% increase from the previous year. Despite the positive revenue growth, Eastman Kodak recorded a loss of $1.23 per share in the fourth quarter. The stock is currently one of the top performers of the day. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AV Laboratories Appoints Dr. Dendy Engelman to Scientific Advisory Board
data.description: A dermatologist named Dr. Dendy Engelman has been appointed to the Scientific Advisory Board of AV Laboratories in New York. This appointment is aimed at guiding skincare innovation with a focus on longevity.

data.description: Enhanced strategic efforts and new client acquisitions have resulted in a better underlying performance. data.title: EssilorLuxottica's Inaugural SWITCH: Vision Innovation Summit delivers an inspiring deep dive into the future of vision care and healthcare, from AI wearables to breakthroughs in neuroscience
data.description: Actress Jane Lynch, AI expert Dr. Rana el Kaliouby, and NBA star J.R. Smith were among the attendees at an event in Orlando, Florida on March 9-11, 2026. EssilorLuxottica organized the event where they discussed the transformation of vision care into a comprehensive health platform. The event brought together global experts to explore this evolving landscape, highlighting the importance of vision care in overall human health.

data.title: DIVIDEND DECLARATION - Wheaton Precious Metals Announces Increase to Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 12, 2026, Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend payment of US$0.195 per common share for 2026. This marks an 18% rise from the previous quarter.

data.title: Wheaton Precious Metals Announces Record Annual Revenue, Earnings and Cash Flow for 2025
data.description: Vancouver, BC - On March 12, 2026, Wheaton announced its fourth quarter and full-year financial results for 2025. The company's high-quality, long-life assets exceeded production guidance, leading to record-breaking revenue, earnings, and operating cash. This stellar performance marked another exceptional year for Wheaton, showcasing strong financial growth.

data.title: In HelloNation, Roofing Expert Justin Cook Details What Impacts Roof Replacement Cost
data.description: In a recent report from Jackson, Wyoming on March 12, 2026, the discussion centered on the various elements that impact the cost of roof replacement. Key considerations highlighted in the review were the type of roofing materials chosen, the level of snow load protection desired, and the specific installation needs. Homeowners preparing for a roof replacement were advised to carefully assess these factors to estimate the overall cost effectively. The report emphasized the importance of understanding how these elements influence pricing to make informed decisions when planning for a new roof.
